untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) yearly price range positioning (yearly high/low not in allowed indicators), (2) specific reversal vs continuation pattern classification (not a standard technical indicator), (3) market regime classification rules not explicitly defined in source text, (4) opening gap detection next day (requires forward-looking data), (5) exact success rates and failure thresholds not quantified. The pattern is qualitative and context-dependent without measurable entry/exit rules.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using trend strength (ADX) and directional price moves, but the core signal relies on yearly positioning and pattern recognition that cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. Author provided no stop-loss or take-profit rules. Confirmation rule about 'opening gap lower the next day' is not implementable in a backtest engine without lookahead bias. Recommend obtaining more specific quantitative parameters from source material.
